from collections import deque
from pathlib import Path

FIRST_MESSAGE = "alpha payload"
SECOND_MESSAGE = "beta payload"


def normalize_items(items):
    if items is None:
        return []

    queue = deque(items)
    ordered_items = []
    while queue:
        ordered_items.append(queue.popleft())
    return ordered_items


def first_item(items):
    iterator = iter(items)
    return next(iterator, None)


def render_summary(items):
    values = []
    for item in items:
        values.append(item.upper())
    return ", ".join(values)


class PayloadManager:
    def __init__(self):
        self.cache = {}
        self.client = object()

    def load_payload(self):
        return self.cache


def build_summary():
    message_path = Path("config") / "settings.json"
    return message_path.name
